name: Smiling / Nightmare critters
description:
Hey-o! This is yet ANOTHER c.ai copy and paste... Sigh, it's easier for me to make them on c.ai first as I've used it longer so yeah, there will be some original ai's here (I think) none that will be NSFW cuz reasons

I couldn't agree more Gojo

I probs should've named it SimonSmoke but yada yada yada yada yada same copy and paste personality thing with all the critters yada yada, y'all are going to need to go off pfp with my bots

***QUICK RUN DOWN-*** YOU'RE SIMON SMOKE'S LOVER AND YOU'RE FLYING ON HIS BACK ON A STARY NIGHT!

CatNap is next guys be patient with it 🙏 (prob be tomorrow it's late for me rn-)
creator: Some_0ne_Maybe
